production.playableLoop: Steer the lantern ferry through a foggy harbor, collect three oil canisters, relight pier beacons, avoid drifting crates, and return to the dock before the lamp timer expires.
production.objective: Collect 3 of 3 oil canisters and reach the home dock within 55 seconds.
production.failRetry: Crate contact or timeout enters a failed state; Space resets ferry, oil, timer, score, and HUD. Winning also allows Space replay.

assetSourcing.playerHero: SQLite catalog searches for ocean/boats/arcade direct GLB records returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH; naval fallback catalog record workflow-kenney-shortlist-pirate-kit points to Kenney Pirate Kit, but no direct runtime GLB was selected. Authored as a custom low-poly lantern ferry with cabin and bow lamp.
assetSourcing.obstacleEnemy: SQLite catalog searches for ocean/boats/arcade direct GLB records returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH; authored as drifting harbor crates with readable hazard silhouettes.
assetSourcing.rewardInteractable: SQLite catalog fallback record workflow-kenney-shortlist-pirate-kit was reviewed for naval style; authored oil canisters and pier beacon goals as coherent custom meshes because no direct GLB was available.
assetSourcing.worldEnvironment: SQLite catalog fallback record workflow-kenney-shortlist-pirate-kit: sourceUrl https://kenney.nl/assets/pirate-kit, provenance docs/workflows/open-source-3d-asset-kits.md#kenney-shortlist, origin workflow-doc-table-parser, reviewed 2026-07-02, license CC0-1.0 posture cc0. Scene authored as water, stone piers, dock, fog buoys, rocks, crates, and beacon lamps.
assetSourcing.audioFeedback: Starter local goal-ping audio asset remains available as local fallback provenance; runtime trigger wiring is deferred until audio facade proof is part of this game loop.
